mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, agent_id, user_id, title, create_time, last_update_time FROM chat_sessions ORDER BY last_update_time DESC
SELECT id, session_id, agent_id, user_id, title, create_time, last_update_time FROM chat_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY last_update_time DESC
SELECT id, session_id, agent_id, user_id, title, create_time, last_update_time FROM chat_sessions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY last_update_time DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO chat_sessions (session_id, agent_id, user_id, title, create_time, last_update_time) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{agentId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{createTime}, #{lastUpdateTime})
SELECT last_insert_rowid()
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_sessions SET session_id = #{sessionId}, agent_id = #{agentId}, user_id = #{userId}, title = #{title}, last_update_time = #{lastUpdateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE chat_sessions SET title = #{title}, last_update_time = datetime('now') WHERE id = #{id}
